title: Ubiquiti security advisory (AV26-498)
description: On May 21, 2026, Ubiquiti published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: UDM, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, Express 7, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max and UCG-Fiber   version 5.0.16 and prior
UDM-Beast, UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8   version 5.1.8 and prior
UDR-5G, ENVR-Core, UCKP, UCK and UCK-Enterprise   version 5.0.17 and prior
UNVR-G2 and UNVR-G2-Pro   version 5.1.11 and prior
UniFi OS Server   version 5.0.6 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
